The '''Dart carbine''' was a [[Blaster carbine/Legends|carbine]] weapon produced by [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Arms]].

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' uses the same 3D model to represent the Dart carbine and the [[Firestar 10-K]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
